data.body: S2b (a9e3) DONE via held-out TDD: WipChain state machine + FFO TOCTOU guard (is_landable) + bounded re-drive (drive_to_submit) + hand_back; added GerritClient.set_review. 8 tests (2 happy + 6 held-out), full suite 21/21 GREEN, teeth verified (is_landable-always-True mutation broke 3 held-out tests). Pushed as Gerrit change #584. Chain: #582(S1)->#583(S2a)->#584(S2b). Claiming S2c (1ccf) next.
